title: Universal Portfolio ETL Schema
description: The standardized JSON object structure generated by the Forensic AI parser regardless of the upstream Indian broker.

stock_name.description: The human-readable name of the asset, stripped of any exchange suffixes (e.g. - EQ, FV2).

isin.description: The 12-digit Indian International Securities Identification Number. Starts with 'IN'. Used as the primary anchor for market data lookup.

quantity.description: The total active number of shares/units held. Must be mathematically greater than 0.

invested_amount.description: The total capital deployed for this holding (buy value). Usually derived as average_price * quantity.

current_value.description: The live market valuation of the holding according to the broker. If missing, it is derived via yfinance.
